conversations.content: I have added some new files to /user/github/linear_algebra_operation. Please upload these files to GitHub to sync the repository.

<function_thought>
I need to upload the newly added files from the specified local directory `/user/github/linear_algebra_operation` to GitHub. The appropriate function for this task is `git_push`, which requires the path of the local files to be uploaded and an optional force parameter. I will proceed to execute the function call using the specified path.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[git_push(local_path="/user/github/linear_algebra_operation", force=False)]</function_call>

<final_answer>
The new files have been successfully uploaded to GitHub to sync the repository.
</final_answer>
